requirement_topic.en: Product Safety — Household Heat Pumps (LVD 2014/35/EU / EN 60335-2-40) — Poland
requirement_topic.zh: 产品安全——家用热泵（低压指令2014/35/EU / EN 60335-2-40）——波兰
requirement_topic.zht: 產品安全——家用熱泵（低壓指令2014/35/EU / EN 60335-2-40）——波蘭

summary.en: Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU applies in Poland as directly effective EU law for electrical equipment operating between 50–1000 V AC or 75–1500 V DC. The Polish grid operates at 230/400 V, 50 Hz, and heat pump electrical safety testing must reflect these operating conditions. The harmonised standard EN 60335-2-40 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for electrical heat pumps, air-conditioners and dehumidifiers) covers insulation, overcurrent protection, earthing, and refrigerant-related electrical hazards. Note: IEC 60335-2-40:2022 (Edition 4) is the current IEC edition; the CENELEC adoption status as a harmonised standard under LVD should be verified at time of compliance assessment. PKN adopts EN 60335 standards as PN-EN standards. Testing must be conducted at an accredited laboratory recognised under the EU framework; laboratory accreditation by PCA (Polskie Centrum Akredytacji — Polish Accreditation Centre) is recognised within the EA MLA framework.
summary.zh: 低压指令2014/35/EU在波兰作为直接适用的欧盟法律，适用于工作电压在50–1000 V AC或75–1500 V DC之间的电气设备。波兰电网运行在230/400 V、50 Hz，热泵电气安全测试须反映这些运行条件。协调标准EN 60335-2-40（家用和类似用途电器安全——热泵、空调器和除湿机的特殊要求）涵盖绝缘、过流保护、接地及与制冷剂相关的电气危险。注：IEC 60335-2-40:2022（第4版）为现行IEC版本；合规评估时应核实作为低压指令协调标准的CENELEC采标状态。PKN将EN 60335标准采标为PN-EN标准。测试须在欧盟框架内认可的认证实验室进行；由PCA（波兰认证中心）认可的实验室在EA MLA框架内获得认可。
summary.zht: 低壓指令2014/35/EU在波蘭作為直接適用的歐盟法律，適用於工作電壓在50–1000 V AC或75–1500 V DC之間的電氣設備。波蘭電網運行在230/400 V、50 Hz，熱泵電氣安全測試須反映這些運行條件。協調標準EN 60335-2-40（家用和類似用途電器安全——熱泵、空調器和除濕機的特殊要求）涵蓋絕緣、過流保護、接地及與制冷劑相關的電氣危險。注：IEC 60335-2-40:2022（第4版）為現行IEC版本；合規評估時應核實作為低壓指令協調標準的CENELEC採標狀態。PKN將EN 60335標準採標為PN-EN標準。測試須在歐盟框架內認可的認證實驗室進行；由PCA（波蘭認證中心）認可的實驗室在EA MLA框架內獲得認可。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60335-2-40:2022 (Edition 4, current IEC — CENELEC adoption status to be verified)
PCA — Polskie Centrum Akredytacji (Polish Accreditation Centre — EA MLA signatory)

summary.en: GB 4706.32-2012 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for heat pumps, air conditioners and dehumidifiers) is China's national adoption of IEC 60335-2-40:2005. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) includes testing to GB 4706.32 at CNAS/CMA accredited laboratories. The Chinese standard is based on an older IEC edition (2005 vs 2022 current); Chinese CCC test reports under GB 4706.32 are not accepted as evidence of conformity with LVD as applied in Poland.
summary.zh: GB 4706.32-2012（家用和类似用途电器安全——热泵、空调器和除湿机的特殊要求）是中国对IEC 60335-2-40:2005的国家采标。中国强制性产品认证（CCC）包括在CNAS/CMA认可实验室按GB 4706.32进行测试。该中国标准基于较旧的IEC版本（2005年版，而非2022年现行版）；GB 4706.32下的中国CCC测试报告不被接受为在波兰适用的低压指令合规证明。
summary.zht: GB 4706.32-2012（家用和類似用途電器安全——熱泵、空調器和除濕機的特殊要求）是中國對IEC 60335-2-40:2005的國家採標。中國強制性產品認證（CCC）包括在CNAS/CMA認可實驗室按GB 4706.32進行測試。該中國標準基於較舊的IEC版本（2005年版，而非2022年現行版）；GB 4706.32下的中國CCC測試報告不被接受為在波蘭適用的低壓指令合規證明。

gap.en: GB 4706.32-2012 is based on IEC 60335-2-40:2005 (older edition); the applicable EN 60335-2-40 version for EU LVD purposes references a later IEC edition. Chinese CCC certification under GB 4706.32 is not accepted as LVD conformity evidence in Poland. Re-testing to the applicable PN-EN 60335-2-40 edition at a PCA-accredited or otherwise EU-recognised laboratory is required, with tests conducted at 230/400 V, 50 Hz (Polish grid conditions, not 220 V Chinese conditions).
gap.zh: GB 4706.32-2012基于IEC 60335-2-40:2005（旧版本）；欧盟低压指令适用的EN 60335-2-40版本引用更新的IEC版本。GB 4706.32下的中国CCC认证在波兰不被接受为低压指令合规证明。须在PCA认可或其他欧盟认可实验室按适用版本PN-EN 60335-2-40重新测试，测试须在230/400 V、50 Hz（波兰电网条件，而非中国220 V条件）下进行。
gap.zht: GB 4706.32-2012基於IEC 60335-2-40:2005（舊版本）；歐盟低壓指令適用的EN 60335-2-40版本引用更新的IEC版本。GB 4706.32下的中國CCC認證在波蘭不被接受為低壓指令合規證明。須在PCA認可或其他歐盟認可實驗室按適用版本PN-EN 60335-2-40重新測試，測試須在230/400 V、50 Hz（波蘭電網條件，而非中國220 V條件）下進行。

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — re-testing to PN-EN 60335-2-40 under EU LVD required in Poland; GB 4706.32 CCC certification not accepted; tests must be conducted at 230/400 V, 50 Hz Polish grid conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——在波兰须按欧盟低压指令要求对PN-EN 60335-2-40进行重新测试；GB 4706.32 CCC认证不被接受；测试须在230/400 V、50 Hz波兰电网条件下进行。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——在波蘭須按歐盟低壓指令要求對PN-EN 60335-2-40進行重新測試；GB 4706.32 CCC認證不被接受；測試須在230/400 V、50 Hz波蘭電網條件下進行。

requirement_topic.en: Commercial Heat Pump Safety — EN 14276 Pressure Accessories and UDT In-Service Inspection (Poland)
requirement_topic.zh: 商业热泵安全——EN 14276压力附件与UDT在役检验（波兰）
requirement_topic.zht: 商業熱泵安全——EN 14276壓力附件與UDT在役檢驗（波蘭）

summary.en: For commercial and industrial air-source heat pumps in Poland, Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU is the mandatory legal framework for vessels and piping meeting its pressure, volume, and fluid-group thresholds. EN 14276-1:2021 (vessels) and EN 14276-2:2021 (piping) are voluntary harmonised standards for refrigerating systems and heat pumps; applying them can support a presumption of conformity with relevant PED essential safety requirements. Beyond CE marking at the point of market placement, Poland requires that pressure equipment within UDT's competence be registered with UDT before being put into service. UDT conducts periodic in-service inspections of pressure devices registered under its supervision (Ustawa o dozorze technicznym — Technical Inspection Act). Importers and Polish operators of commercial heat pump systems must factor UDT registration and periodic inspection timelines into commissioning plans.
summary.zh: 对于波兰境内的商业和工业空气源热泵，压力设备指令2014/68/EU是适用于达到其压力、容积和流体组别阈值的容器和管道的强制性法律框架。EN 14276-1:2021（容器）和EN 14276-2:2021（管道）是制冷系统和热泵的自愿协调标准；采用这些标准可支持对相关PED基本安全要求的符合性推定。除市场投放时的CE标志外，波兰还要求属于UDT管辖权限的压力设备在投入使用前向UDT进行注册。UDT依据《技术检验法》对其监管下注册的压力设备进行定期在役检验。商业热泵系统的进口商和波兰运营商在制订调试计划时须考虑UDT注册和定期检验的时间安排。
summary.zht: 對於波蘭境內的商業和工業空氣源熱泵，壓力設備指令2014/68/EU是適用於達到其壓力、容積和流體組別閾值的容器和管道的強制性法律框架。EN 14276-1:2021（容器）和EN 14276-2:2021（管道）是制冷系統和熱泵的自願協調標準；採用這些標準可支持對相關PED基本安全要求的符合性推定。除市場投放時的CE標誌外，波蘭還要求屬於UDT管轄權限的壓力設備在投入使用前向UDT進行登記。UDT依據《技術檢驗法》對其監管下登記的壓力設備進行定期在役檢驗。商業熱泵系統的進口商和波蘭運營商在制訂調試計劃時須考慮UDT登記和定期檢驗的時間安排。

standards_or_laws: EN 14276-1:2021 (voluntary harmonised standard — pressure vessels for refrigerating systems)
EN 14276-2:2021 (voluntary harmonised standard — piping for refrigerating systems)
Ustawa o dozorze technicznym (Polish Technical Inspection Act)
UDT — Urząd Dozoru Technicznego (Office of Technical Inspection, Poland)

summary.en: GB 150 series (Pressure vessels — design and manufacture) and TSG 21-2016 (Special Equipment Safety Technical Supervision Regulations for Boilers and Pressure Vessels, administered by SAMR/SELO) govern pressure vessels in China. Chinese classification methodology, inspection regime, and registration requirements differ substantially from EU PED and EN 14276. Chinese in-service inspection certificates issued by SAMR-designated inspection bodies are not recognised by UDT in Poland.
summary.zh: GB 150系列（压力容器——设计与制造）和TSG 21-2016（锅炉和压力容器安全技术监察规程，由市监总局/特检院管理）管辖中国境内的压力容器。中国分类方法、检验制度和注册要求与欧盟PED和EN 14276体系存在实质性差异。市监总局指定检验机构颁发的中国在役检验证书在波兰不被UDT认可。
summary.zht: GB 150系列（壓力容器——設計與製造）和TSG 21-2016（鍋爐和壓力容器安全技術監察規程，由市監總局/特檢院管理）管轄中國境內的壓力容器。中國分類方法、檢驗制度和登記要求與歐盟PED和EN 14276體系存在實質性差異。市監總局指定檢驗機構頒發的中國在役檢驗證書在波蘭不被UDT認可。

gap.en: EU/Polish legal compliance for commercial heat pump pressure equipment must be assessed against PED. EN 14276 vessel and piping methods differ from Chinese GB 150/TSG 21 classification, inspection, and registration practice. In Poland, UDT in-service registration and periodic inspection requirements apply in addition to PED CE marking for pressure equipment within UDT's competence. Chinese SELO/TSG certificates and in-service inspection records are not recognised by UDT. Chinese manufacturers should advise Polish importers to obtain UDT registration before commissioning and to budget for periodic UDT inspection costs.
gap.zh: 商业热泵压力设备的欧盟/波兰法律合规性必须按PED评估。EN 14276关于容器和管道的方法与中国GB 150/TSG 21的分类、检验和注册做法不同。在波兰，属于UDT管辖权限的压力设备须在PED CE标志要求之外额外满足UDT在役注册和定期检验要求。中国SELO/TSG证书和在役检验记录不被UDT认可。中国制造商应建议波兰进口商在调试前办理UDT注册，并在预算中计入定期UDT检验费用。
gap.zht: 商業熱泵壓力設備的歐盟/波蘭法律合規性必須按PED評估。EN 14276關於容器和管道的方法與中國GB 150/TSG 21的分類、檢驗和登記做法不同。在波蘭，屬於UDT管轄權限的壓力設備須在PED CE標誌要求之外額外滿足UDT在役登記和定期檢驗要求。中國SELO/TSG證書和在役檢驗記錄不被UDT認可。中國製造商應建議波蘭進口商在調試前辦理UDT登記，並在預算中計入定期UDT檢驗費用。

source.publisher: UDT — Urząd Dozoru Technicznego (Office of Technical Inspection, Poland)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — PED classification and conformity assessment drive the mandatory obligation; EN 14276 is a voluntary harmonised route to presumption of conformity; Chinese SELO/TSG certificates not recognised in Poland; UDT in-service registration and periodic inspection are mandatory in Poland for pressure equipment within UDT competence, beyond CE marking scope.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——PED分类和符合性评定构成强制性义务；EN 14276是取得符合性推定的自愿协调标准路径；中国SELO/TSG证书在波兰不被认可；属于UDT管辖权限的压力设备在波兰须满足CE标志范围之外的UDT在役注册和定期检验强制要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——PED分類和符合性評定構成強制性義務；EN 14276是取得符合性推定的自願協調標準路徑；中國SELO/TSG證書在波蘭不被認可；屬於UDT管轄權限的壓力設備在波蘭須滿足CE標誌範圍之外的UDT在役登記和定期檢驗強制要求。
